arts.ttl: Barcelona youngster emerges as late-window transfer target for Bournemouth
arts.sum: A member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has made his way onto the transfer radar of Bournemouth. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards Pablo…

arts.ttl: Santiago Gimenez: Barcelona push Rashford aside to focus on Mexico star
arts.sum: Although the Mexico international is thought to be close to a move to AC Milan, Barcelona are looking at other options in attack as Robert Lewandowski’s heir, Vitor Roque, has failed to fire since arriving in Spain a year ago. Feyenoord want €50 million for Gimenez, which is a price that is described as being “considerable but feasible” for Barcelona.
A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was forced into a premature departure from training on Friday. That’s according to Jijantes, who point towards Raphinha…

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Gavi signs new Barcelona contract until 2030
arts.sum: It’s been a long and hard road back for Gavi but he is now looking back to his best for the Catalans and can hopefully stay injury-free now. Barcelona confirmed on Friday that midfielder Gavi has become the latest young star to extend his contract at the club.

arts.ttl: Barcelona confirm Alex Valle has joined Como on loan
arts.sum: Barcelona have confirmed that left-back Alex Valle has joined Serie A side Como for the rest of the season on loan. Barcelona will be hoping that Valle can enjoy plenty of game time with Como before he returns to the club at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: The Rolling Stones save Barcelona’s El Clásico headache
arts.sum: As the club look to negotiate a Montjuic extension into May, the Catalan side were given some good news after it was confirmed that The Rolling Stones will not be touring in Europe next May as was planned with the Stones concert date in Barcelona at the Estadi Olímpic scheduled to clash with El Clásico against Real Madrid on the weekend of 11 May. The setback in the stadium redevelopment is hitting the club financially and with the tenancy on their current Montjuic home set to expire at the end of April, the venue for the second El Clásico of the season was thrown into doubt.

arts.ttl: Gavi renews at Barcelona until 2030 – here’s everything you need to know
arts.sum: Barcelona dropped the news earlier on today that they had agreed their fourth contract renewal for a player in a fairly short period of time. This time around the player…

arts.ttl: Watch: New Barcelona signing arrives for medical after Real Madrid beaten to deal
arts.sum: Footage of an incoming signing at La Liga giants Barcelona arriving at the club for his medical tests has on Friday come to the fore online. The player in question?…

arts.ttl: Gavi commits to Barcelona with new deal: “My lifelong club”
arts.sum: After Barcelona officially extended Pedri’s contract until 2030 on Thursday, the club has now done the same with Pablo Martín Páez Gaviria, AKA Gavi . The contract has been extended by four years until 2030, with no details disclosed about the release clause, following the new policy adopted by the club, which was first implemented last week with Ronald Araújo’s new deal .

arts.ttl: Man United transfers: Marcus Rashford to Barcelona has taken another twist
arts.sum: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford is facing an uncertain future at the club after constantly being dropped by manager Ruben Amorim. For their Europa League match this week, Rashford once again found himself out of the club but that has been the case for a number of weeks now and it is not surprising anymore.
